authors.author: Joshua Grimmett
Joshua Grimmett
Liebe, so groß (Du bist mein Gott allmächtig)

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Your love so great Jesus in all things I’ve seen a glimpse of Your heart A billion years still I’ll be singing How can I praise You enough? How can I praise You enough?

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You are the Lord Almighty Outshining all the stars in glory Your love is like the wildest ocean Oh nothing else compares

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Creation calls all to the Savior We are alive for Your praise In earth and sky no one is higher Our God of wonders You reign Our God of wonders You reign

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Not to us but to Your Name We lift up all praise (x2) Not to us but to Your Name We lift up all praise (x2)
